## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Type of change

<!-- Delete those that don't apply. -->

- feat: new capability
- fix: bug fix
- docs: documentation only
- refactor / perf / test / build / ci / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`uv run cz commit`)
- [ ] `uv run ruff format .` and `uv run ruff check .` pass
- [ ] `uv run mypy` passes
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes (added/updated tests for the change)
- [ ] Docs / docstrings updated if behaviour changed
- [ ] Parsing changes are covered by a fixture in `tests/fixtures/` (no live-site dependency)

## Notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: tradeoffs, follow-ups, out-of-scope items. -->
